description: Default permissions for RisenLab's main window — this app has no capabilities file at all, so every built-in Tauri API call (window close/minimize/maximize, the custom titlebar's drag region) silently fails with no visible error: custom #[tauri::command]s (everything the app actually does — textures/models/animations/settings) are always callable regardless of capabilities, but the close (X) button specifically calls the built-in @tauri-apps/api/window API, which Tauri v2 permission-gates.
